Interactive Proof Lab runs on witnessbc.com — scroll to scenarios below.

Five beats on camera

  1. Request → policy eval at dispatch
  2. BLOCK on red-line violation
  3. ESCALATE → human gate → ALLOW
  4. Signed receipt on disk
  5. Tamper-FAIL on hand edit · replay

15s cycle · request → tamper-FAIL
